use_cases: Display customer testimonials with animated avatar images on landing pages
Create social proof sections for SaaS and e-commerce product pages
Build testimonial carousels to showcase user feedback
Showcase user reviews with circular avatar images in a minimal card format
ai_summary: A simple animated testimonial card component featuring circular avatars built with Radix UI primitives, designed to display customer testimonials with smooth animations and a minimalist flat visual style for enhanced social proof sections.
